name: Peanut Butter Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 9 inch pie crust, chocolate wafer,  see note
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake the pie crust according to the package instructions.
2. Beat the cream cheese until fluffy.
3. Add the Cool Whip Lite®, peanut butter, confectioner's sugar, and sugar substitute to the cream cheese. Mix well.
4. Place the mixture in the prepared pie crust.
5. Chill the pie for at least 2 hours before serving.
Note: Vanilla wafer, graham or regular crust may also be used.
